decisions.decision: Use --dangerously-skip-permissions when invoking the claude CLI subprocess in claude_code_executor.py
decisions.rationale: User explicitly authorized this via AskUserQuestion after the auto-mode safety classifier flagged it (subprocess `claude -p <prompt>` would otherwise stall on permission prompts in headless use). Scoped only to this one subprocess call.
